name: @codegeneai/cloudflare-tunnel-action
description: Run a cloudflared connector on a GitHub Actions runner.
author: CodeGeneAI

scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/index.js && bun build src/post.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/post.js
scripts.verify-dist: bun run build && git diff --exit-code -- dist/
